config.stacksizetweaks.title: Stack Size Tweaks
config.stacksizetweaks.label.info:
Change the default stack size of items.

Use 0 for max stack size (2,100,000,000).

Changes to stack sizes require a restart to take effect.
config.stacksizetweaks.group.item_groups: Max stack sizes for different item groups
Maximum stack size for regular items.
Maximum stack size for food items.
config.stacksizetweaks.low_stack_limit.d: Maximum stack size for items that normally stack up to 16.
Maximum stack size for stews and soups (foods that use a bowl).
config.stacksizetweaks.potion_stack_limi: Maximum stack size for regular, splash, and lingering potions.
config.stacksizetweaks.bucket_stack_limi: Maximum stack size for bucket items.
Maximum stack size for music discs.
config.stacksizetweaks.enchanted_book_st: Maximum stack size for enchanted books.
config.stacksizetweaks.non_stackable_sta: Maximum stack size for all items that don't stack normally. Will likely cause issues for some items.
config.stacksizetweaks.overrides.descrip:
Change stack sizes for specific items.
Format: minecraft:example_item=64
config.stacksizetweaks.use_custom_font.d: Use a smaller custom font for item counts to reduce clutter."
config.stacksizetweaks.shorten_item_amou: Make item counts show up as short as possible i.e. 300M -> 0.3B, 123K -> 0.1M
